title: malaxis autumnalis
intro: Malaxis autumnalis, also known as the autumn fairy orchid or autumn gentian, is a species of orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malaxis autumnalis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Malaxis autumnalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
